it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.PersonalDocument

    Constructors in it.tdlight.jni with parameters of type TdApi.PersonalDocument
    Constructor Description
    PassportElementBankStatement​(TdApi.PersonalDocument bankStatement)
    A Telegram Passport element containing the user's bank statement.
    PassportElementPassportRegistration​(TdApi.PersonalDocument passportRegistration)
    A Telegram Passport element containing the user's passport registration pages.
    PassportElementRentalAgreement​(TdApi.PersonalDocument rentalAgreement)
    A Telegram Passport element containing the user's rental agreement.
    PassportElementTemporaryRegistration​(TdApi.PersonalDocument temporaryRegistration)
    A Telegram Passport element containing the user's temporary registration.
    PassportElementUtilityBill​(TdApi.PersonalDocument utilityBill)
    A Telegram Passport element containing the user's utility bill.
